title: NonCave
description: mod that make huge cave with support overworld and nether!
body:
# NonCave
![Overworld Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OjCArRMu/images/449e119206ba47d6f6bb8d06441b555cd275c791.png)
This mod is change world gen to make huge cave!

support overworld cave and nether cave!

 

This mod also add midshale(harder than stone but weaker than deepslate)

 

## Credit

This mod is originaly for Noncafe

kurobell - idea

moromorochan - midshale
